# Scenario: Multi-tool session with text, bash, permission, and question
# Source: Real debug log from a test session (2026-03-06).
#
# Flow:
#   1. User sends message via :eval
#   2. SSE events arrive: user message, session busy, assistant message
#   3. Assistant streams "abcdefg" text
#   4. Bash tool (pwd) runs — pending, then running, then completed
#   5. Bash tool (git checkout a) needs permission → popup shown
#   6. Text part finalized
#   7. Permission popup displayed
#   8. User allows permission "once" via :eval
#   9. Server confirms permission.replied → question popup appears
#  10. git checkout a runs and fails (pathspec 'a' not found)
#  11. First assistant message completes (finish: tool-calls)
#  12. Second assistant message with question tool
# (load-file (expand-file-name "../../test-helper.el" (file-name-directory buffer-file-name)))
# (load-file (expand-file-name "../../opencode-scenario-test.el" (file-name-directory buffer-file-name)))
# (opencode-scenario-run-file buffer-file-name)

:session ses_33e2ee637ffeGdTqDXBdDD6xO6
:directory /Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el

# Mock APIs
:api POST /session/ses_33e2ee637ffeGdTqDXBdDD6xO6/prompt_async 204 null
:api POST /permission/per_cc1d1baa0001858J7nAgPuzeDh/reply 200 true

# --- User sends message ---

:eval (opencode-chat--send "this is a test session. you have to follow my instruction to do the follow stuff.\n  1. all operation should within a message.\n  2. output \"abcdefg\".\n  3. then run bash with `pwd`\n  4. then run bash with `git checkout a`\n  5. then ask me a question with title \"test question\" option\n     a. test1\n     b. test2\n     c. test3")

# --- SSE: user message created ---

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"message.updated","properties":{"info":{"id":"msg_cc1d18598000GmVFgh9DBLdXqc","sessionID":"ses_33e2ee637ffeGdTqDXBdDD6xO6","role":"user","time":{"created":1772778259876},"agent":"build","model":{"providerID":"Ttadk","modelID":"claude-opus-4-6"}}}}}

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_cc1d18598001TWX8Oqo2kUJmN4","sessionID":"ses_33e2ee637ffeGdTqDXBdDD6xO6","messageID":"msg_cc1d18598000GmVFgh9DBLdXqc","type":"text","text":"this is a test session. you have to follow my instruction to do the follow stuff.\n  1. all operation should within a message.\n  2. output \"abcdefg\".\n  3. then run bash with `pwd`\n  4. then run bash with `git checkout a`\n  5. then ask me a question with title \"test question\" option\n     a. test1\n     b. test2\n     c. test3"}}}}

# --- Session becomes busy ---

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"session.updated","properties":{"info":{"id":"ses_33e2ee637ffeGdTqDXBdDD6xO6","slug":"sunny-nebula","version":"0.0.0-feat/show-mcp-error-202601260136","projectID":"d2dea25e61793f9dee62c6404c8990151db68d60","directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","title":"New session - 2026-03-06T06:23:52.265Z","time":{"created":1772778232265,"updated":1772778259885}}}}}

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"session.status","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_33e2ee637ffeGdTqDXBdDD6xO6","status":{"type":"busy"}}}}

:assert-busy

# --- Assistant message created ---

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"message.updated","properties":{"info":{"id":"msg_cc1d185c6001GuREXdXAlsVUp5","sessionID":"ses_33e2ee637ffeGdTqDXBdDD6xO6","role":"assistant","time":{"created":1772778259910},"parentID":"msg_cc1d18598000GmVFgh9DBLdXqc","modelID":"claude-opus-4-6","providerID":"Ttadk","mode":"build","agent":"build","path":{"cwd":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","root":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el"},"cost":0,"tokens":{"input":0,"output":0,"reasoning":0,"cache":{"read":0,"write":0}}}}}}

# --- Intermediate user message update (summary) + session updates ---

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"message.updated","properties":{"info":{"id":"msg_cc1d18598000GmVFgh9DBLdXqc","sessionID":"ses_33e2ee637ffeGdTqDXBdDD6xO6","role":"user","time":{"created":1772778259876},"summary":{"diffs":[]},"agent":"build","model":{"providerID":"Ttadk","modelID":"claude-opus-4-6"}}}}}

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"session.updated","properties":{"info":{"id":"ses_33e2ee637ffeGdTqDXBdDD6xO6","slug":"sunny-nebula","version":"0.0.0-feat/show-mcp-error-202601260136","projectID":"d2dea25e61793f9dee62c6404c8990151db68d60","directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","title":"New session - 2026-03-06T06:23:52.265Z","time":{"created":1772778232265,"updated":1772778268205},"summary":{"additions":0,"deletions":0,"files":0}}}}}

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"session.diff","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_33e2ee637ffeGdTqDXBdDD6xO6","diff":[]}}}

# --- Step start ---

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_cc1d1b131001gdbh0nSBDdr01A","sessionID":"ses_33e2ee637ffeGdTqDXBdDD6xO6","messageID":"msg_cc1d185c6001GuREXdXAlsVUp5","type":"step-start","snapshot":"e0806a5b980b29d32e263cdde9fd62834a66f95d"}}}}

# --- Streaming text: "abcdefg" (two deltas) ---

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_cc1d1b133001obeyWbGJhg2oui","sessionID":"ses_33e2ee637ffeGdTqDXBdDD6xO6","messageID":"msg_cc1d185c6001GuREXdXAlsVUp5","type":"text","text":"\n\nab","time":{"start":1772778271027}},"delta":"\n\nab"}}}

:assert-contains ab

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_cc1d1b133001obeyWbGJhg2oui","sessionID":"ses_33e2ee637ffeGdTqDXBdDD6xO6","messageID":"msg_cc1d185c6001GuREXdXAlsVUp5","type":"text","text":"\n\nabcdefg","time":{"start":1772778271027}},"delta":"cdefg"}}}

:assert-contains abcdefg

# --- Tool: bash pwd (pending) ---

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_cc1d1b1a9001oWp8LnTp2m9tfG","sessionID":"ses_33e2ee637ffeGdTqDXBdDD6xO6","messageID":"msg_cc1d185c6001GuREXdXAlsVUp5","type":"tool","callID":"toolu_vrtx_014JqbtTaV9nmZQyM5dpymXf","tool":"bash","state":{"status":"pending","input":{},"raw":""}}}}}

# --- Tool: bash git checkout a (pending) ---

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_cc1d1b37c001zm0X3aMRJO2gW4","sessionID":"ses_33e2ee637ffeGdTqDXBdDD6xO6","messageID":"msg_cc1d185c6001GuREXdXAlsVUp5","type":"tool","callID":"toolu_vrtx_01WEvxeqcU7hvPZ3Uhg2Sri8","tool":"bash","state":{"status":"pending","input":{},"raw":""}}}}}

# --- Text finalized ---

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_cc1d1b133001obeyWbGJhg2oui","sessionID":"ses_33e2ee637ffeGdTqDXBdDD6xO6","messageID":"msg_cc1d185c6001GuREXdXAlsVUp5","type":"text","text":"\n\nabcdefg","time":{"start":1772778272141,"end":1772778272141}}}}}

# --- Tool: bash pwd (running) ---

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_cc1d1b1a9001oWp8LnTp2m9tfG","sessionID":"ses_33e2ee637ffeGdTqDXBdDD6xO6","messageID":"msg_cc1d185c6001GuREXdXAlsVUp5","type":"tool","callID":"toolu_vrtx_014JqbtTaV9nmZQyM5dpymXf","tool":"bash","state":{"status":"running","input":{"command":"pwd","description":"Print working directory"},"time":{"start":1772778272166}}}}}}

# --- Permission asked: bash "git checkout a" ---

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"permission.asked","properties":{"id":"per_cc1d1baa0001858J7nAgPuzeDh","sessionID":"ses_33e2ee637ffeGdTqDXBdDD6xO6","permission":"bash","patterns":["git checkout a"],"metadata":{},"always":["git checkout*"],"tool":{"messageID":"msg_cc1d185c6001GuREXdXAlsVUp5","callID":"toolu_vrtx_01WEvxeqcU7hvPZ3Uhg2Sri8"}}}}

# Permission popup should be displayed
:assert-contains git checkout a
:assert-permission

# --- Tool: bash pwd (running, with output) ---

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_cc1d1b1a9001oWp8LnTp2m9tfG","sessionID":"ses_33e2ee637ffeGdTqDXBdDD6xO6","messageID":"msg_cc1d185c6001GuREXdXAlsVUp5","type":"tool","callID":"toolu_vrtx_014JqbtTaV9nmZQyM5dpymXf","tool":"bash","state":{"status":"running","input":{"command":"pwd","description":"Print working directory"},"metadata":{"output":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el\n","description":"Print working directory"},"time":{"start":1772778273446}}}}}}

# --- Tool: bash git checkout a (running, waiting for permission) ---

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_cc1d1b37c001zm0X3aMRJO2gW4","sessionID":"ses_33e2ee637ffeGdTqDXBdDD6xO6","messageID":"msg_cc1d185c6001GuREXdXAlsVUp5","type":"tool","callID":"toolu_vrtx_01WEvxeqcU7hvPZ3Uhg2Sri8","tool":"bash","state":{"status":"running","input":{"command":"git checkout a","description":"Checkout branch 'a'"},"time":{"start":1772778273474}}}}}}

# --- Tool: bash pwd (running, with output 2) ---

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_cc1d1b1a9001oWp8LnTp2m9tfG","sessionID":"ses_33e2ee637ffeGdTqDXBdDD6xO6","messageID":"msg_cc1d185c6001GuREXdXAlsVUp5","type":"tool","callID":"toolu_vrtx_014JqbtTaV9nmZQyM5dpymXf","tool":"bash","state":{"status":"running","input":{"command":"pwd","description":"Print working directory"},"metadata":{"output":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el\n","description":"Print working directory"},"time":{"start":1772778273489}}}}}}

# --- Tool: bash pwd (completed) ---

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_cc1d1b1a9001oWp8LnTp2m9tfG","sessionID":"ses_33e2ee637ffeGdTqDXBdDD6xO6","messageID":"msg_cc1d185c6001GuREXdXAlsVUp5","type":"tool","callID":"toolu_vrtx_014JqbtTaV9nmZQyM5dpymXf","tool":"bash","state":{"status":"completed","input":{"command":"pwd","description":"Print working directory"},"output":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el\n","title":"Print working directory","metadata":{"output":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el\n","exit":0,"description":"Print working directory","truncated":false},"time":{"start":1772778272166,"end":1772778273497}}}}}}

# --- User allows permission "once" ---

:answer-permission allow-once
:assert-no-permission

# --- Server confirms permission replied ---

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"permission.replied","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_33e2ee637ffeGdTqDXBdDD6xO6","requestID":"per_cc1d1baa0001858J7nAgPuzeDh","reply":"once"}}}

# --- Tool: bash git checkout a (running, after permission granted) ---

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_cc1d1b37c001zm0X3aMRJO2gW4","sessionID":"ses_33e2ee637ffeGdTqDXBdDD6xO6","messageID":"msg_cc1d185c6001GuREXdXAlsVUp5","type":"tool","callID":"toolu_vrtx_01WEvxeqcU7hvPZ3Uhg2Sri8","tool":"bash","state":{"status":"running","input":{"command":"git checkout a","description":"Checkout branch 'a'"},"metadata":{"output":"","description":"Checkout branch 'a'"},"time":{"start":1772778284739}}}}}}

# --- Tool: bash git checkout a (running, error output arrives) ---

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_cc1d1b37c001zm0X3aMRJO2gW4","sessionID":"ses_33e2ee637ffeGdTqDXBdDD6xO6","messageID":"msg_cc1d185c6001GuREXdXAlsVUp5","type":"tool","callID":"toolu_vrtx_01WEvxeqcU7hvPZ3Uhg2Sri8","tool":"bash","state":{"status":"running","input":{"command":"git checkout a","description":"Checkout branch 'a'"},"metadata":{"output":"error: pathspec 'a' did not match any file(s) known to git\n","description":"Checkout branch 'a'"},"time":{"start":1772778284769}}}}}}

# --- Tool: bash git checkout a (completed, exit=1) ---

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_cc1d1b37c001zm0X3aMRJO2gW4","sessionID":"ses_33e2ee637ffeGdTqDXBdDD6xO6","messageID":"msg_cc1d185c6001GuREXdXAlsVUp5","type":"tool","callID":"toolu_vrtx_01WEvxeqcU7hvPZ3Uhg2Sri8","tool":"bash","state":{"status":"completed","input":{"command":"git checkout a","description":"Checkout branch 'a'"},"output":"error: pathspec 'a' did not match any file(s) known to git\n","title":"Checkout branch 'a'","metadata":{"output":"error: pathspec 'a' did not match any file(s) known to git\n","exit":1,"description":"Checkout branch 'a'","truncated":false},"time":{"start":1772778273474,"end":1772778284771}}}}}}

# --- Step finish (first assistant message) ---

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_cc1d1e6e7001rplqmJ6eb5tD1n","sessionID":"ses_33e2ee637ffeGdTqDXBdDD6xO6","messageID":"msg_cc1d185c6001GuREXdXAlsVUp5","type":"step-finish","reason":"tool-calls","snapshot":"e0806a5b980b29d32e263cdde9fd62834a66f95d","cost":0,"tokens":{"input":0,"output":135,"reasoning":0,"cache":{"read":0,"write":0}}}}}}

# --- First assistant message finalized ---

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"message.updated","properties":{"info":{"id":"msg_cc1d185c6001GuREXdXAlsVUp5","sessionID":"ses_33e2ee637ffeGdTqDXBdDD6xO6","role":"assistant","time":{"created":1772778259910,"completed":1772778284817},"parentID":"msg_cc1d18598000GmVFgh9DBLdXqc","modelID":"claude-opus-4-6","providerID":"Ttadk","mode":"build","agent":"build","path":{"cwd":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","root":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el"},"cost":0,"tokens":{"input":0,"output":135,"reasoning":0,"cache":{"read":0,"write":0}},"finish":"tool-calls"}}}}

# --- Session stays busy (second round of tool calls) ---

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"session.status","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_33e2ee637ffeGdTqDXBdDD6xO6","status":{"type":"busy"}}}}

# --- Second assistant message created (for question tool) ---

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"message.updated","properties":{"info":{"id":"msg_cc1d1e716001pAx3BwmxJdk0wx","sessionID":"ses_33e2ee637ffeGdTqDXBdDD6xO6","role":"assistant","time":{"created":1772778284822},"parentID":"msg_cc1d18598000GmVFgh9DBLdXqc","modelID":"claude-opus-4-6","providerID":"Ttadk","mode":"build","agent":"build","path":{"cwd":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","root":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el"},"cost":0,"tokens":{"input":0,"output":0,"reasoning":0,"cache":{"read":0,"write":0}}}}}}

# --- More session updates ---

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"message.updated","properties":{"info":{"id":"msg_cc1d18598000GmVFgh9DBLdXqc","sessionID":"ses_33e2ee637ffeGdTqDXBdDD6xO6","role":"user","time":{"created":1772778259876},"summary":{"diffs":[]},"agent":"build","model":{"providerID":"Ttadk","modelID":"claude-opus-4-6"}}}}}

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"session.updated","properties":{"info":{"id":"ses_33e2ee637ffeGdTqDXBdDD6xO6","slug":"sunny-nebula","version":"0.0.0-feat/show-mcp-error-202601260136","projectID":"d2dea25e61793f9dee62c6404c8990151db68d60","directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","title":"New session - 2026-03-06T06:23:52.265Z","time":{"created":1772778232265,"updated":1772778290647},"summary":{"additions":0,"deletions":0,"files":0}}}}}

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"session.diff","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_33e2ee637ffeGdTqDXBdDD6xO6","diff":[]}}}

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"session.status","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_33e2ee637ffeGdTqDXBdDD6xO6","status":{"type":"busy"}}}}

# --- Step start (second assistant message) ---

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_cc1d2073b001x5uGhnwIgKiTVE","sessionID":"ses_33e2ee637ffeGdTqDXBdDD6xO6","messageID":"msg_cc1d1e716001pAx3BwmxJdk0wx","type":"step-start","snapshot":"e0806a5b980b29d32e263cdde9fd62834a66f95d"}}}}

# --- Tool: question (pending) ---

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_cc1d2073c0010mkHkEumDujXmt","sessionID":"ses_33e2ee637ffeGdTqDXBdDD6xO6","messageID":"msg_cc1d1e716001pAx3BwmxJdk0wx","type":"tool","callID":"toolu_vrtx_011A67WBj322VfkZVhf6EKck","tool":"question","state":{"status":"pending","input":{},"raw":""}}}}}

# --- Question asked ---

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"question.asked","properties":{"id":"que_cc1d20a95001FPv52EFlpM25to","sessionID":"ses_33e2ee637ffeGdTqDXBdDD6xO6","questions":[{"question":"test question","header":"test question","options":[{"label":"test1","description":"Option A"},{"label":"test2","description":"Option B"},{"label":"test3","description":"Option C"}]}],"tool":{"messageID":"msg_cc1d1e716001pAx3BwmxJdk0wx","callID":"toolu_vrtx_011A67WBj322VfkZVhf6EKck"}}}}

# --- After permission is dismissed, question popup should appear ---

:assert-contains Question
:assert-contains test1
:assert-contains test2
:assert-contains test3
:assert-question

# --- User answers question: select option 1 (test1) and submit ---

# Mock the question reply API
:api POST /question/que_cc1d20a95001FPv52EFlpM25to/reply 200 true

:answer-question 1
:assert-no-question

# --- Tool: question (running, with question details) ---

:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_cc1d2073c0010mkHkEumDujXmt","sessionID":"ses_33e2ee637ffeGdTqDXBdDD6xO6","messageID":"msg_cc1d1e716001pAx3BwmxJdk0wx","type":"tool","callID":"toolu_vrtx_011A67WBj322VfkZVhf6EKck","tool":"question","state":{"status":"running","input":{"questions":[{"question":"test question","header":"test question","options":[{"label":"test1","description":"Option A"},{"label":"test2","description":"Option B"},{"label":"test3","description":"Option C"}]}]},"time":{"start":1772778293910}}}}}}

# --- Final assertions ---
:assert-busy
:assert-contains abcdefg
